  scripts/event_backtest.py \
  --strategy \
  bpc \
  --start-date \
  2024-07-01 \
  --end-date \
  2024-07-31 \
  --strategies-root \
  /home/yin/trading/ml_trading_bot/results/bpc/turbo-rolling-sim/_rolling_sim/20260409_171133/fast_month_2024-07/strategies_calibrated \
  --data-path \
  data/parquet_data \
  --trading-map \
  /home/yin/trading/ml_trading_bot/results/bpc/turbo-rolling-sim/_rolling_sim/20260409_171133/fast_month_2024-07/bpc/trading_map_bpc_event.html \
  --export \
  /home/yin/trading/ml_trading_bot/results/bpc/turbo-rolling-sim/_rolling_sim/20260409_171133/fast_month_2024-07/bpc/event_trades_bpc.csv \
  --output \
  /home/yin/trading/ml_trading_bot/results/bpc/turbo-rolling-sim/_rolling_sim/20260409_171133/fast_month_2024-07/bpc/event_backtest_bpc.json \

  --map-extra-months \
  4 \

  /home/yin/trading/ml_trading_bot/results/bpc/turbo-rolling-sim/_rolling_sim/20260409_171133/fast_month_2024-07/bpc/end_state.json \
  --keep-open-positions
